data.title: AZ Blue introduces new 2026 Prosano Health® Plans for ACA, offering Arizonans coverage and care in one.
data.description: In October 23, 2025, Arizonans were presented with the opportunity to access healthcare through the new 2026 Prosano Health® Plans under the ACA. Blue Cross Blue Shield of Arizona (AZ Blue) introduced these plans as a comprehensive option for individuals and families in need of health coverage. This initiative offers a seamless combination of coverage and care, catering to the needs of more residents in the region.

data.title: Home equity rates drop; 46.1% of homes equity-rich, while seriously underwater homes rise in 46 states.
data.description: A recent report by ATTOM revealed that 46.1% of homes across the country are classified as equity-rich. Additionally, the proportion of seriously underwater homes has increased compared to the previous year in 46 states. The report, covering the third quarter of 2025, highlights these trends in the U.S. real estate market.

data.title: Movie "Aftershock: The Nicole P Bell Story" about Sean Bell's murder narrated by fiancé Nicole P Bell to release worldwide Nov 28.
data.description: Faith Media Distribution has announced that the movie "Aftershock: The Nicole P Bell Story" will be hitting theaters worldwide on November 28, 2025. The film tells the story of the tragic events following the wrongful shooting of Sean Bell. This release will be happening in major cities like New York and Los Angeles.

data.title: Meet Buzz, AI intern by Hive, saves 8 hrs/week, cutting inbox time by 37%, launched on Oct. 23, 2025.
data.description: New AI tool Buzz, introduced by Hive in New York on Oct. 23, 2025, is designed to automate users' tasks, saving them 8 hours each week. As a tireless intern available round-the-clock, Buzz helps reduce inbox time by 37%. In the beta phase, users were able to reclaim an average of 8 hours weekly by utilizing Buzz for various work-related functions.

data.title: WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) will announce its 2025 third-quarter results on Oct. 30 with a conference call at 1 p.m.
data.description: On October 23, 2025, WEC Energy Group Inc. (NYSE: WEC) announced that it will be releasing its third-quarter earnings report for 2025 before the market opens on October 30. Additionally, a conference call will be held on the same day at 1 p.m. Central time for investors and security analysts to discuss the financial results.

data.title: MOVA reveals advanced robotic pool cleaner, Rover X10, with underwater drone-like agility at Las Vegas launch.
data.description: In Las Vegas on October 23, 2025, MOVA, a leading smart home company, introduced their latest product, the Rover X10 robotic pool cleaner. This innovative device utilizes vertical thrust technology to perform various underwater movements such as rising, hovering, descending, and moving laterally. The X10 is designed to efficiently clean pools and enhance maintenance processes.

data.title: Price.com partners with Erewhon to offer AI-powered shopping for members, giving one year of free Price.com Pro with 50% more cash back.
data.description: Price.com, an innovative savings platform powered by AI, has recently partnered with Erewhon's Lifestyle Collective, which features top collaborators like Prenuvo, Bon Charge, Pvolve, Seed Health, and Alo Yoga. This strategic alliance aims to offer a specialized array of wellness, fitness, diagnostics, and lifestyle benefits to enhance daily experiences. Under this partnership, Erewhon members can access Price.com Pro for a year at no cost, gaining perks that include a significant increase of 50% in cash back rewards.

data.title: Odys Aviation names Oliver Reinhardt as Head of Design Organization, brings 30 years of experience.
data.description: In Long Beach, California, Odys Aviation has appointed Oliver Reinhardt as the new Head of Design Organization. With over 30 years of experience in aviation and automotive sectors, Reinhardt specializes in aircraft certification, safety, and innovative design. Previously serving as the Chief Risk and Certification Officer at Vo, he brings a wealth of knowledge to Odys Aviation's team of professionals. The company focuses on developing hybrid-electric vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) aircraft, aiming to revolutionize the aerospace industry.

data.title: Ludwig Institute study: 'Off-the-books' work ineffective for most low-income workers, only 670,000 Americans benefit.
data.description: A recent study revealed that "off-the-books" income is not significantly benefiting the finances of low-income workers. The research, conducted in Washington, reported that approximately 670,000 Americans engage in informal work daily. Contrary to popular belief, this clandestine economy is not as effective in alleviating financial struggles for those with lower incomes.
Russia's Medvedev stated that the powers in the field of external labor migration will be transferred to the Ministry of Internal Affairs

data.title: Mercury Insurance highlights cybersecurity during National Cybersecurity Awareness Month due to increasing cybercrime rates - FBI reported over 859,000 complaints.
data.description: For National Cybersecurity Awareness Month, it's crucial to safeguard yourself. Mercury Insurance acknowledges the surge in cyberattacks. The U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) reports over 859,000 cybercrime complaints. Stay vigilant online.

data.title: Czech company H₂ Global Group gets approval for Alzheimer's therapy clinical study with molecular hydrogen.
data.description: In Prague on October 23, 2025, the European innovation frontrunner, H₂ Global Group, revealed that its branch, H₂ Medical Technologies, has been given the green light by The State Institute for Drug Control (SÚKL) to commence a clinical examination concentrating on molecular hydrogen.

data.title: Lightricks launches LTX-2 an open-source AI video model with 4K at 50fps, 10-sec sequences, and consumer-grade GPU support.
data.description: A cutting-edge open-source foundation model, LTX-2, has been launched in New York on Oct. 23, 2025. It combines synchronized audio and video generation, boasting native 4K fidelity at 50 frames per second, enabling 10-second sequences, while emphasizing radical efficiency. The system is unique for running on consumer-grade GPUs and is designed to be production-ready.

data.title: Frost & Sullivan awards top organizations at the 2025 Gala for innovation and excellence in global industries.
data.description: Commending notable achievements in various global sectors, Frost & Sullivan recognized exceptional companies worldwide during the 2025 Best Practices Recognition Gala in San Antonio on Oct. 23. The prestigious event took place at the JW Marriott Tucson Starr Pass Resort & Spa, showcasing leadership and innovation in different industries.

data.title: Project Tomorrow's 22nd annual report reveals student optimism for AI use in classrooms, emphasizing need for dialogue and educator training.
data.description: The 22nd yearly update advocates for fostering communication between students and teachers, emphasizing the need for further education for instructors as students increasingly incorporate artificial intelligence (AI) into their daily routines. This report was released in Irvine, California on October 23, 2025, by Project Tomorrow, a prominent education nonprofit group.

data.title: LA partners with Cisco and nonprofits to launch public Wi-Fi, addressing internet access gaps.
data.description: The collaboration between the City of Los Angeles, tech company Cisco, and various local nonprofits has led to the introduction of a new public Wi-Fi network. This initiative aims to bridge the internet access divide and enhance the connectivity of Los Angeles' public infrastructure in preparation for upcoming major events. This partnership marks a significant step forward in improving access to digital resources for residents and businesses in the city.

data.title: AuditBoard and EY US expand partnership to revolutionize risk management with cutting-edge technology and expertise.
data.description: A recent collaboration has been established to offer exceptional visibility and assurance in a challenging risk environment by merging top-tier technology with extensive industry expertise. This strategic partnership, announced in San Diego on October 23, 2025, during the 2025 Audit & Beyond event, aims to enhance risk management capabilities. AuditBoard, recognized as the leading global platform utilizing artificial intelligence, plays a key role in this partnership, promising groundbreaking solutions for managing risks. The joint initiative underscores the commitment to address the complexities of risk in today's landscape by leveraging state-of-the-art technology.

data.title: Fireblocks acquires Dynamic to speed up on-chain adoption for fintechs & enterprises, providing a platform for onboarding users.
data.description: In New York, a new comprehensive developer platform has been launched, catering to enterprises, fintechs, payment platforms, and startups. This platform allows for the quick onboarding of users on-chain, providing seamless and secure on-chain consumer experiences. This includes services such as stablecoin accounts, DeFi trading, and yield generation. This initiative aims to streamline these processes and facilitate a more efficient and user-friendly experience for individuals and businesses in the digital finance sector.
Rubio: Israel has reached confirmation of America's firm commitment to Israel's security and communication with partners to implement the historic peace plan

data.title: U.S. health workers brought back from furlough for Medicare, A.C.A. enrollments. Costs covered by user fees from researchers.
data.description: Federal employees will resume work on Monday, with the expenses covered by fees gathered from researchers.
